SEARCH
程序包 com.example.syntaxappproject

类 Comment

java.lang.Object
com.example.syntaxappproject.Comment
public class Comment extends Object
Model class representing a comment on an event in the SyntaxEvents application.

This class is used as a Firestore data model and is serialized/deserialized directly via DocumentSnapshot.toObject(Comment.class). Each comment is associated with a specific event and user.

Comments support a reporting system where users can report inappropriate content. Each report is tracked by storing the reporting user's ID in the reportedBy list, allowing the system to prevent duplicate reports from the same user.

Fields:

  • commentId - Firestore document ID (set after creation)
  • eventId - ID of the event this comment belongs to
  • commentText - The actual content of the comment
  • userId - UID of the user who posted the comment
  • userName - Display name of the comment author
  • userDeviceId - Device ID of the comment author (for tracking)
  • timestamp - Auto-generated timestamp when the comment was created
  • reportCount - Number of reports this comment has received
  • reportedBy - List of user IDs who have reported this comment
另请参阅:
  • CommentRepository
  • EventDetail
  • EventDetailFragment
  • AdminBrowseCommentsFragment

  • 构造器详细资料

    • Comment

      public Comment()
      Required no-argument constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    • Comment

      public Comment(String eventId, String commentText, String userId, String userName, String userDeviceId)
      Constructs a new comment with the specified data.

      Initializes reportCount to 0 and reportedBy to an empty list.

      参数:
      eventId - the ID of the event this comment belongs to
      commentText - the content of the comment
      userId - the UID of the user posting the comment
      userName - the display name of the user posting the comment
      userDeviceId - the device ID of the user posting the comment

    • isReportedByCurrentUser

      public boolean isReportedByCurrentUser(String userId)
      Checks whether a specific user has already reported this comment.

      Used to prevent duplicate reports and to determine whether to show "Report" or "Reported" in the UI.

      参数:
      userId - the ID of the user to check
      返回:
      true if the user has already reported this comment, false otherwise

    • addReportedByUser

      public void addReportedByUser(String userId)
      Adds a user to the list of users who have reported this comment.

      This method prevents duplicate entries by checking if the user is already in the list before adding. Should be called when a user reports a comment, along with incrementing reportCount.

      参数:
      userId - the ID of the user reporting the comment
